title: arctostaphylos costaricensis
intro: Arctostaphylos costaricensis, also known as the Costa Rican manzanita, is a type of evergreen shrub that belongs to the heath family (Ericaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Arctostaphylos costaricensis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
